economic_notes: Penelakut Seafood Ltd. (100% owned GBE, year ended Aug 31 2019: revenues $312,814, profit $28,080). Spune'lexutth' Holdings Incorporated (100% owned GBE, year ended Mar 31 2020: revenues $77,590, loss $34,001). Both accounted for on modified equity basis.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Two GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Penelakut Seafood Ltd. and Spune'lexutth' Holdings Inc. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. Recovery of Funds line ($524,812) represents recoveries payable to funding agencies reversed in revenue. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $7,958,752 + Health Authority $1,524,087 + CSETS $270,821 + Province of BC $2,827,093 + FNESC $958,811 + Recovery of Funds (-$524,812) = $13,014,762; however Other revenue of $1,270,161 and Rent $493,466 treated as OSR. Capital Operations expenses ($1,711,486) included under expenses_infrastructure. expenses_salaries_total derived from Note 11: wages $3,830,202 + benefits $566,995 = $4,397,197. current_liabilities = accounts payable $442,006 + overdraft $25,000 + deferred revenue $502,415 = $969,421 (deferred revenue also shown separately). Replacement and Operating Reserves $997,025 classified within liabilities on balance sheet.
